title: Magnificently Flaky French Almond Macaron
description: A deliciously flaky and sour French macaron featuring Italian seasoning and lardons, perfect for a diabetic-friendly date night dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, sift together the almond flour and confectioners sugar.
In a large bowl, whip the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Add the granulated sugar and whip until combined.
Add the Italian seasoning, lardons, and lemon juice, and whip until smooth.
Slowly add the sifted almond flour mixture to the egg mixture and whip until stiff peaks form.
Transfer the mixture to a piping bag and pipe into small circles.
Tap the baking sheet gently to remove any air bubbles.
Allow the macarons to sit at room temperature for 30 minutes to form a skin.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until the tops are firm and the edges are lightly golden.
